nodes.name: Utility Service Entry

nodes.name: Water Main Entry
nodes.description: 4" ductile iron water service from city main on Pacific Ave, per IPC 603

nodes.name: Gas Service Entry
nodes.description: 2" steel gas service from Puget Sound Energy main — low pressure entry per IFGC 401

nodes.name: Gas Meter Assembly
nodes.description: Exterior-accessible gas meter with earthquake shutoff valve per IFGC 409

nodes.name: Pressure Regulator
nodes.description: Service regulator reducing to 7" WC for building distribution per IFGC 402

nodes.description: Manual main shutoff valve — labeled and accessible per IFGC 409.5

nodes.name: Commercial Gas Tee
nodes.description: Branch tee — splits commercial feed from riser feed

nodes.name: Bakery Gas Connection
nodes.description: Gas manifold for bakery ovens, proof box, and deck oven — per IFGC 623 for commercial cooking

nodes.name: Deli Gas Connection
nodes.description: Gas manifold for deli fryers, grill, and steam table

nodes.name: Gas Riser Base
nodes.description: Base of gas riser to penthouse — 1.5" steel in ventilated chase per IFGC 404

nodes.name: Gas Riser Top
nodes.description: Top of gas riser at penthouse level

nodes.name: Boiler Gas Connection
nodes.description: Gas connection to central condensing boiler — flex connector with shutoff per IFGC 411
